---
id: sync-customer
title: "Customer Synchronization"
description: "Syncs customer account details, service addresses (Premises), and meter configurations from the utility CIS to EnergyGrid."
sidebar_label: "Customer Synchronization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/powerbox-api

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Customer Synchronization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/powerbox/customer"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Syncs customer account details, service addresses (Premises), and meter configurations from the utility CIS to EnergyGrid.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Customer data synchronized successfully","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"clientId":{"type":"string","description":"Unique customer identifier","example":"123456789"},"firstName":{"type":"string","example":"John"},"lastName":{"type":"string","example":"Doe"},"AcctStatus":{"type":"string","description":"Account status (A = Active)","example":"A"},"customerSites":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"externalSiteId":{"type":"string","description":"Premise ID from utility CIS","example":"5113305555"},"isPrimary":{"type":"boolean","example":true},"address1":{"type":"string","example":"123 Main St."},"city":{"type":"string","example":"Detroit"},"state":{"type":"string","example":"MI"},"postalCode":{"type":"string","example":"48067"},"meters":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"meterId":{"type":"string","example":"123456789"},"meterType":{"type":"string","enum":["Electric","Gas"],"example":"Electric"},"unitOfMeasure":{"type":"string","example":"kWh"},"isAMI":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates if meter supports Advanced Metering Infrastructure","example":true},"rateCode":{"type":"string","example":"RES1"},"billingCycleId":{"type":"integer","example":1}},"title":"Meter"}}},"title":"CustomerSite"}}},"title":"CustomerResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized - Invalid or expired token"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - Account locked or closed"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
